rationale: No qualitative change for Poland this cycle — Iran deal remains unresolved (energy price uncertainty continues), war in Ukraine unchanged, other headlines irrelevant to Polish daily life.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: Trump says Sunday signing, Tehran disputes
top_events.summary: Continued uncertainty over Iran nuclear/sanctions deal keeps oil supply outlook unclear, indirectly affecting energy prices in Poland. No resolution yet — same pattern as prior cycles.

top_events.title: Israel attacks Lebanon amid Iran deal talks
top_events.summary: Israeli strikes on Lebanon add regional instability near the Iran negotiations, marginally raising risk of oil market disruption relevant to Polish energy costs.

top_events.title: EU migration debate: rival marches in Rome, new EU rules
top_events.summary: Ongoing EU-wide migration policy debate has indirect relevance to Poland's border and refugee pressures, but no new binding decisions this cycle.
